name: VIP
description: Stand out with the VIP rank. Enjoy exclusive in-game perks, cosmetics, and access to VIP-only areas.

name: Warrior
description: The Warrior rank grants enhanced combat abilities, exclusive cosmetics, and priority queue access.

name: Knight
description: Elite Knight status with powerful perks, a prestigious title, and access to Knight-exclusive commands.

name: Sky
description: Soar above the competition. The Sky rank provides premium sky perks, unique cosmetics, and exclusive privileges.

name: Trainee
description: The legendary Trainee rank — for the most dedicated players. Maximum perks, cosmetics, and server recognition.

name: Common Key
description: Opens a Common Crate. Contains a selection of basic in-game rewards and items to kickstart your journey.

name: Pro Key
description: Opens a Pro Crate. Better rewards, higher drop rates, and a chance at rare cosmetics.

name: Crimson Key
description: Opens the Crimson Crate. Rare and powerful drops with a guaranteed premium item.

name: Amethyst Key
description: Opens the Amethyst Crate. Premium drops guaranteed, including exclusive amethyst cosmetics.

name: Blue Key
description: Opens the legendary Blue Crate. The most exclusive rewards on the server — only for the elite.

name: Sell Axe
description: Amethyst Sell Axe — active for 7 days after redemption. Significantly boosts your sell earnings in-game.

name: Shovel
description: Amethyst Shovel — active for 7 days after redemption. Dig faster and collect more resources than ever.

name: Axe
description: Amethyst Axe — active for 7 days after redemption. Enhanced woodcutting speed and combat power.

name: Pickaxe
description: Amethyst Pickaxe — active for 7 days after redemption. Unmatched mining efficiency and ore yield.

name: Shard Booster
description: Amethyst Shard Booster — active for 7 days after redemption. Massive boost to shard generation rate.
